brewery.brewery_description: Classically inspired with a modern approach.

beer.beer_name: Not So Usual - Belgian Strong Whisky Ale
My Mind She Runs - Golden Saison

items.checkin_comment: A great change of pace, shared with friends. Paired well with some chilli flavoured chips 🌶️

beer.beer_description:
Additions of dried Sauvignon blanc grapes aka Phantasm in conjunction with Nelson Sauvin Hops gives a fruit, wine like nose. Peach, apricot jam, herbal, floral…Total foodie vibes.

This beer was crafted with Pilsner, Wheat, Crystal & Chit Malt, Farmhouse Yeast, Nelson Sauvin Hops & Phantasm.

user.bio: Trying to rate beers for what they are, while knowing my taste is heavily subjective.

items.badge_description: You have a keen taste for this Belgian masterpiece. Did you know the Saison style beer was invented by Belgian farms, brewed in the Winter and served the Spring/Summer to all their workers? Well now you do! That’s 30 different Farmhouse Ales! Try 5 more for Level 7.

items.checkin_comment: A nice strong ale. Dried fruits, not so much whisky, but that doesn't matter. It's smooth and tasty.

beer.beer_name: Not So Usual - Belgian Strong Whisky Ale
beer.beer_description:
A souped up Belgian Golden Strong Ale. 

Aged in Tasmaninan Whisky Barrels for a big Whisky kick, balanced by caramel & honeycomb notes.

Will age & develop nicely in the bottle. Grab some for now, & some for the cellar.

This beer was crafted with Belgian Pilsner & Vienna Malts, Biscuit, Candi Syrup D-45, Styrian Goldings & Wakatu Hops, Decadence Yeast.

Following our popular Double & Triple WCIPA’s, this proper West Coast IPA delivers citrus, pine & tropical punch on a clean, dry malt base with a satisfying bitterness.

This beer was crafted with Voyager Compass, Wheat & Carahell Malts, Columbus, Idaho, Citra & a Big Dose of Strata Hops.

items.checkin_comment: Divine. Full bodied strong whisky flavoured Barley Wine. Deep dried fruit character.

beer.beer_description:
Brewed with a big whack of Australian golden syrup & lightly aged in Whisky Barrels to give a big, vanilla, toffee, caramel beer.

There’s a longer story behind this beer, with a special guest helping with the brew, he knows who he is.

This beer crafted with Maris Otter, Dark Crystal Malt, Golden Syrup & EKG Hops.

items.checkin_comment: Decent hoppy, bitter and piney WCIPA

beer.beer_description:
Following our popular Double & Triple WCIPA’s, this proper West Coast IPA delivers citrus, pine & tropical punch on a clean, dry malt base with a satisfying bitterness.

This beer was crafted with Voyager Compass, Wheat & Carahell Malts, Columbus, Idaho, Citra & a Big Dose of Strata Hops.

Dark chocolate meets intense dark fruits with a lingering whisky barrel finish.

This beer was crafted with Veloria, Maris Otter, Biscuit, Voodoo, D240 Candi Syrup, EKG Hops & Mogwai Yeast, Roasted & Chocolate Malts.

items.badge_description: Originally created and brewed for Russian Emperor Peter the Great, the Russian Imperial Stout has a history as rich as it’s roasty, hoppy flavor. That's 160 different beers with the style of Russian Imperial Stout! Try 5 more for Level 33!

beer.beer_description:
Dark chocolate meets intense dark fruits with a lingering whisky barrel finish.

This beer was crafted with Veloria, Maris Otter, Biscuit, Voodoo, D240 Candi Syrup, EKG Hops & Mogwai Yeast, Roasted & Chocolate Malts.

This is an experiment on Short barrel contact time which has resulted in smooth vanilla & caramel richness boosted by nitro in can to provide a rich creamy mouthful.

Rest In Peace Otis. A good boy, a great boy, the best boy.

This beer was crafted Maris Otter, rolled Oats, Chocolate Wheat, Roasted Barley, Special B & Crystal Malts.

beer.beer_name: My Mind She Runs - Golden Saison
beer.beer_description:
Barrel aged for 1 year with our mixed culture that has grown up over the years in our home brewery.

A Balanced & funky sour beer with citrus notes & a lightly toasty oak finish. Enjoy the whole bottle now or let it develop over the next few years. Pairs beautifully with a Tarte Tatin or Crème caramel.

This beer was crafted with Australian Malt & Wheat, Czech Hops, Farmhouse Yeast, Brett, Pediococcus & Lactobicilus.

This is an experiment on Short barrel contact time which has resulted in smooth vanilla & caramel richness boosted by nitro in can to provide a rich creamy mouthful.

Rest In Peace Otis. A good boy, a great boy, the best boy.

This beer was crafted Maris Otter, rolled Oats, Chocolate Wheat, Roasted Barley, Special B & Crystal Malts.

Aged in Lark whisky barrels, this beer has a golden syrup colour with notes of Crème Brulee, vanilla, & stone fruit with a sweet biscuity finish. Brewed by a brewer who’s seen better days...break ups suck.

This beer was crafted with Simpsons Pale Malt, Biscuit, Crystal & Golden Candi Syrup, Challenger Hops & Belgian Yeast.

Brewed with a big whack of Australian golden syrup & lightly aged in Whisky Barrels to give a big, vanilla, toffee, caramel beer.

There’s a longer story behind this beer, with a special guest helping with the brew, he knows who he is.

This beer crafted with Maris Otter, Dark Crystal Malt, Golden Syrup & EKG Hops.

Aged in Lark whisky barrels, this beer has a golden syrup colour with notes of Crème Brulee, vanilla, & stone fruit with a sweet biscuity finish. Brewed by a brewer who’s seen better days...break ups suck.

This beer was crafted with Simpsons Pale Malt, Biscuit, Crystal & Golden Candi Syrup, Challenger Hops & Belgian Yeast.

Brewed with a big whack of Australian golden syrup & lightly aged in Whisky Barrels to give a big, vanilla, toffee, caramel beer.

There’s a longer story behind this beer, with a special guest helping with the brew, he knows who he is.

This beer crafted with Maris Otter, Dark Crystal Malt, Golden Syrup & EKG Hops.

items.badge_description: You don't always intend to go for beers with a double digit ABV, but when you do, you make it count! Cheers to you, but be careful, 10% and up can really pack a punch. That's 210 different beers with an ABV of 10% and up. Try 5 more for Level 43!

beer.beer_name: Sparkling Forest - Belgian Style Sparkling Ale
beer.beer_description:
The canned version of our Gold Medal winning Pétillant Bier, a sparkling, refreshing Belgian style vibrant golden ale. With a wonderfully spicy, peppery & floral aroma, accentuating the crisp, dry finish.

BELGIAN STYLE BEER CAN BE MORE CARBONATED THAN A STANDARD IPA OR LAGER..PLEASE POUR CAREFULLY INTO BOWL STYLE GLASSWARE.

Enjoy with a huge plate of prawns & your mates for maximum effect.

This beer was crafted with European Malt, Wakatu & Saaz Hops & Ardennes Yeast.

Our best bitter inspired by drinking sessions around British pubs in our youth. This bitter has a firm malty backbone, balanced bitterness & drinkability. Biscuity, caramel back notes compliment this refreshing British Ale.

This beer was Crafted with Voyager Compass, Biscuit, Crystal & Belgian Special B, EKG & Styrian Goldings Hops & Mogwai London Town Yeast.

Light crackery Malt base, soft bitterness, big pineapple notes with splashes of Peaches, apricot & a zesty lime finish.

This beer was crafted with Voyager Compass, Rolled Oats & Carapils Malt, Motueka, Moutere, Riwaka & Rakau hops.

This beer features one of our favourite hop combos, dry hopped with loads of Citra & Simcoe with Backnotes of whole hop Columbus in the boil to give a super citrusy, Pithy & Piney IPA.

This beer was crafted with British Malt, Malted Oats & Light Crystal, Columbus Whole Hops, Cryo Citra & Simcoe.

*Contains Gluten

The beer that started it all. aged in Australian single malt whisky barrels for 1 year. 1 whole year of waiting, looking at barrels & being patient, knowing it's worth the wait. A complex beer tasting of dark chocolate, coffee & whisky, all balanced by a soft bitterness & that superb barrel-aged flavour.

This crafted beer features New Zealand Malt & Yorkshire Yeast.

If you've tried our Patience Imperial Stout, the base of this beer will be familiar.

There was always a delicious dark chocolate vibe with the Patience, but now it's a chocolate bomb! Packed full of Guatemalan Single Origin organic cocoa, with jammy dried fruit, vanilla & honey, balanced by bitterness & a long finish.

This beer was crafted with all New Zealand Malt, Single Origin Cacao, D45 Candi Syrup, Challenger & EKG Hops, Yorkshire Yeast.

A beer brought together by two ideas: A Belgian dark strong ale with a wee bit of Scottish influence. Lightly carbonated, this is a big but soft malty beer with caramel & stone fruit flavours. It’s balanced with sweet & spicy umami & a cognac-like finish that’s perfect with dessert.

This crafted beer features Scottish Malt, Belgian Malt & Ardennes Yeast.

beer.beer_name: Eight Zero Eight Eight - Belgian Pale Ale
beer.beer_description:
This beer won best Belgian specialty ale in our home brewing years. A Belgian pale ale made with Belgian Pilsner, Vienna & Munich malts, Riwaka hops & coriander.

Delicate honeycomb malt character with a crisp finish. This beer is complex yet easy drinking with a fruity, spicy note thanks to our favourite Riwaka Hops, coriander & our Belgian yeast.

This beer was Crafted with Belgian Pilsner Malt, German Vienna & Munich Malt & Australian Voodoo, Styrian Goldings, Riwaka Hops, Coriander & Ardennes Yeast.

Dark chocolate meets intense dark fruits with a lingering whisky barrel finish.

This beer was crafted with Veloria, Maris Otter, Biscuit, Voodoo, D240 Candi Syrup, EKG Hops & Mogwai Yeast, Roasted & Chocolate Malts.

Bright, fresh & zesty, this sour ale was fermented with a Brett strain which punches out a lot of fruit flavours, though fruit has never touched this beer. Combined with a mix of Lactobacillus & conditioned for 6 months in stainless tanks to enhance the bright flavours.

This beer was crafted with Australian compass, wheat malt & rolled wheat.

When making this beer we threw everything at it, using processes we've been refining over the past 2 years. This is step 1 in a long line of hoppy beer experiments we have in the pipeline.

This beer was crafted with pale ale, Pilsner, Chit & malted oats, Phantasm, plus Thiol Boosters. Mash hopped with Riwaka & Nelson Sauvin from NZ Hops, Cryo Mosaic hops, Garston Motueka & Motueka Hop Kief from freestyle hops & Verdant IPA Yeast.

This beer was designed to be served with food & has a wine like flavour profile & subtle tartness that should develop in the bottle.

This beer was crafted with Belgian Pilsner Malt, Australian Veloria & Rolled Wheat, Styrian Goldings Hops & Mixed Culture.

Smooth, delicate yet big & strong. This beer was aged in local Rye whisky barrels to deliver balanced whisky & vanilla backnotes with hints of chocolate & dried fruits.

This beer was crafted with Maris Otter, Munich i & ii, Caramunich, Carafa Special, Chocolate Wheat & Dark Crystal.

At Fontaine, our love for Nelson Sauvin hops runs deep & in this brew, it's all we used. Mash hopped with Nelson in the boil, Nelson hop oil in the whirlpool, dry hopped with Nelson Cryo & freestyle Nelson hop Kief then cold fermented.

This beer was crafted with Dingemans Pilsner Malt, Malted Wheat & Chit, hopped with Nelson Sauvin in all its forms.

Dark, delectable, delicious, aged in Australian single malt whisky barrels.This beer was crafted with Maris Otter, Chocolate, Biscuit, Roasted, Crystal & Special B Malts, D-90 Dark Candi Syrup & Styrian Goldings Hops.

A malty IPA with an earthy, woodland, fruit hop character, balanced by a firm, crisp bitterness that leaves you wanting another sip.

This beer was crafted with Golden Promise, Caramel Rye, Columbus, & El Dorado Hops.

beer.beer_name: Not So Usual - Belgian Strong Whisky Ale
beer.beer_description:
A souped up Belgian Golden Strong Ale. 

Aged in Tasmaninan Whisky Barrels for a big Whisky kick, balanced by caramel & honeycomb notes.

Will age & develop nicely in the bottle. Grab some for now, & some for the cellar.

This beer was crafted with Belgian Pilsner & Vienna Malts, Biscuit, Candi Syrup D-45, Styrian Goldings & Wakatu Hops, Decadence Yeast.

We made a small batch of Sauvignon Blanc wine with Thiol boosting yeast & blended it with our Belgian Tripel. This elegant blond ale is a perfect sipper & a great accompaniment to food. Floral with balanced spice.

This beer was crafted with Sauvignon Blanc from orange via Piggs Peake winery, Belgian Pilsner, Aromatic & Biscuit Malts, Riwaka, Motueka & Nelson Sauvin Hops, Ardennes Yeast.

Bright, airy, like a fresh afternoon breeze on a warm spring day. Ripe wine grapes, citrus, tropical notes on the nose, spicy notes, pepper, clove & star anise.

This beer was crafted with Belgian pilsner malts, Australian rolled wheat & Aromatic, Motueka Hops & Nelson Sauvin.

beer.beer_name: Stars And Roses - Nitro Whisky Stout
beer.beer_description:
This Nitro Stout sure packs a punch!

Aged in Australian Rye Whisky Barrels from NSW & blended with Victorian Single Malt Whisky Barrels.

Hints of Blackcurrant, chocolate & coffee round out a delicious beer that will pair nicely with a slice of black forest cake.

This beer was crafted with Roast Chocolate & Biscuit Malt, EKG Hops, Candi Syrup & Belgian Ardennes Yeast.

*Contains Gluten

beer.beer_name: She'll Be Ripe - Cherry Old Ale
beer.beer_description:
Barrel fermented in our barrels that once housed our Patience imperial stout. Fermented with cherries & aged with old an english Brett Strain. This beer will change & develop over years in the bottle. Backed by a Brett funk, cherry & Leather notes, slight wood tannins & a chocolaty dry finish.

This beer was Crafted with Maris Otter, Carafa, Aromatic, Biscuit & Special B Malt, EKG Hops, Cherry, Old Ale English yeast.

Originally part of our seasonal range, our award winning saison has been tweaked & refined to produce crisp vibrant citrus & floral notes that will pair perfectly with chicken or smoked pork.

This beer was crafted with Australian Malt, New Zealand Riwaka & Motueka Hops & Farmhouse Yeast.
Packed full of berries, this sour is refreshing & thirst quenching.This beer was crafted with Pilsner Malt, Vienna Malts, Pislner, Wheat, Oats & Berries.
Clean, crisp, easy drinking lager.

A strong dark ale aged in whiskey barrels & blended with Single O organic Guatemalan Cacao, Vanilla Beans & Christmas spices.

This beer was crafted with Belgian Malt, Extra Dark Candi Syrup, Single O Cacao, Vanilla Beans, Xmas Spices, Styrian Goldings Hops & Ardennes Yeast.
